About me
← the human behind the sketches

I'm a UI/UX designer with 2 years of hands-on experience designing user-friendly, functional interfaces for mobile apps and web-based SaaS platforms.

My process is proper design-thinking — empathy mapping, user research, behavioral analysis, usability testing — then sketching, wireframing and polishing until every pixel earns its place.

Currently freelancing on Upwork with clients worldwide. Strong with HTML, CSS & React — so my designs aren't just pretty, they're built to ship: responsive, accessible and developer-friendly. 🚀

6+case studies published ✍️
2 yrsdesigning products 🎨
8.78CGPA — BBA (CA), SPPU 🎓
📜UI/UX Design Certification — tutedude.com ↗

How I work
← my messy-but-magical process ✨
01 🔍

Discover

User research, empathy mapping & behavioral analysis.

listen first 👂
02 🧭

Define

Problem framing, user flows, journeys & information architecture.

find the path 🗺️
03 ✏️

Design

Sketches to wireframes to hi-fi UI — built on scalable design systems.

make it beautiful ✨
04 🚀

Deliver

Usability testing, iteration & pixel-perfect developer handoff.

ship with love 💙
